message:
fix(frankenterm-core): correct tab stop preservation during cursor resize

Fix the resize() method to only set default tab stops on newly added
columns rather than potentially overwriting user-cleared stops in the
original range. Track old_cols before resize and only apply 8-column
interval defaults for indices >= old_cols.

Also add two targeted tests:
- resize_wider_sets_tab_stops_on_new_columns: verifies user-cleared
  stops are preserved and new columns get default 8-col intervals
- resize_narrower_preserves_existing_tab_stops: verifies shrink
  correctly truncates without corrupting existing stops

Add ftui-pty as a dev-dependency for the new differential terminal
test harness (differential_terminal.rs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
